name: SpacetimeDB Multi-Table Aggregate Reconciliation
summary: Persist aggregate child collections as separate tables using pure natural-key diff plans executed by repositories.

items: Load current child rows with a scoped index such as `(workspace_id, aggregate_id)`.
Build desired child rows from the domain aggregate with surrogate primary keys set to zero.
Diff current and desired rows by natural key, not by auto-increment row id.
For matched rows, graft the stored row id onto the desired row before update and skip unchanged rows.
Return an insert/update/delete plan from pure code and let the repository execute it.

items.text: Reconciliation tests prove updates preserve stored row ids.
Unchanged children are not written back unnecessarily.
Insert/delete behavior is tested for removed and newly added child natural keys.
